1: area of investigation in current research.
3: AlphaEvolve is an AI agent developed by Google designed to discover and optimize
4: algorithms. It utilizes a combination of LLMs, specifically Gemini models (Flash and
5: Pro), automated evaluation systems, and an evolutionary algorithm framework. This
6: system aims to advance both theoretical mathematics and practical computing
8: AlphaEvolve employs an ensemble of Gemini models. Flash is used for generating a
9: wide range of initial algorithm proposals, while Pro provides more in-depth analysis
10: and refinement. Proposed algorithms are then automatically evaluated and scored
11: based on predefined criteria. This evaluation provides feedback that is used to
12: iteratively improve the solutions, leading to optimized and novel algorithms.
13: In practical computing, AlphaEvolve has been deployed within Google's infrastructure.
14: It has demonstrated improvements in data center scheduling, resulting in a 0.7%
15: reduction in global compute resource usage. It has also contributed to hardware
16: design by suggesting optimizations for Verilog code in upcoming Tensor Processing
17: Units (TPUs). Furthermore, AlphaEvolve has accelerated AI performance, including a
18: 23% speed improvement in a core kernel of the Gemini architecture and up to 32.5%
19: optimization of low-level GPU instructions for FlashAttention.
20: In the realm of fundamental research, AlphaEvolve has contributed to the discovery of
21: new algorithms for matrix multiplication, including a method for 4x4 complex-valued
22: matrices that uses 48 scalar multiplications, surpassing previously known solutions. In
23: broader mathematical research, it has rediscovered existing state-of-the-art solutions
24: to over 50 open problems in 75% of cases and improved upon existing solutions in
25: 20% of cases, with examples including advancements in the kissing number problem.
26: OpenEvolve is an evolutionary coding agent that leverages LLMs (see Fig.3) to
27: iteratively optimize code. It orchestrates a pipeline of LLM-driven code generation,
28: evaluation, and selection to continuously enhance programs for a wide range of tasks.
29: A key aspect of OpenEvolve is its capability to evolve entire code files, rather than
30: being limited to single functions. The agent is designed for versatility, offering support
31: for multiple programming languages and compatibility with OpenAI-compatible APIs
